title: Startup Context Payload
description: Startup routing payload returned when an agent needs the minimum safe context for entering or resuming work in a repository.

kind.description: Discriminator for the startup context payload shape.

target.description: Resolved target repository for the startup decision.

invoked_cli_identity.description: Observed identity of the Agentic Workspace CLI that produced this payload.

cli_compatibility.description: Compatibility assessment between the invoked CLI and any repo-configured CLI expectations.

kind.description: Discriminator for the local CLI invocation guidance.

primary.description: Preferred local command prefix for invoking Agentic Workspace.

source.description: Where the preferred invocation was resolved from.

bare_command.description: Default executable name agents may try first.

fallback_when_unavailable.description: Compact recovery guidance when the bare command is not on PATH.

status.description: Whether the invocation identity needs attention before non-trivial work.

reasons.description: Compact reasons the invoked CLI may not match the repo's expected invocation.

invoked_source_class.description: Class of CLI module that produced this startup payload.

invoked_target_relation.description: Whether the invoked CLI module appears inside or outside the target repo.

required_next_action.description: Immediate correction step before relying on the startup payload.

trust.description: Trust posture to apply until the invocation mismatch is resolved.

mismatch.description: Attention payload shown when startup detects a likely stale or wrong CLI invocation.

cli_invocation.description: Local command invocation guidance for PATH-limited agent environments.

id.description: Stable identifier used to reference this record.

command.description: Command string or command name used by this contract.

surface.description: Surface text value used by this contract.

why.description: Why text value used by this contract.

items.description: One entry in the startup sequence list.

startup_sequence.description: Ordered surfaces and commands an agent should use before opening broader repo context.

feature_tier.description: Resolved feature tier and package footprint for the target repository.

context_router.description: Available compact context-router views and when to use each one.

adaptive_routing.description: Machine-readable need classification, read budget, and escalation detail commands for this startup packet.

todo_active_count.description: Todo active count numeric value used by this contract.

active_execplan.description: Active execplan contract value used by this contract.

planning_status.description: Planning status text value used by this contract.

active_state_summary.description: Small active-work projection used to decide whether raw planning state needs to be opened.

package_boundary.description: Current package/root boundary information for the command invocation.

items.description: One entry in the authority markers list.

authority_markers.description: Authority markers relevant to startup, ownership, and safe editing.

action.description: Action text value used by this contract.

summary.description: Short human-readable summary for this entry.

command.description: Command string or command name used by this contract.

run.description: Run contract value used by this contract.

risk.description: Risk text value used by this contract.

items.description: One entry in the required inputs list.

required_inputs.description: Ordered required inputs entries used by this contract.

next_proof.description: Next proof text value used by this contract.

items.description: One entry in the read first list.

read_first.description: Ordered read first entries used by this contract.

open_execplan_only_when.description: Open execplan only when text value used by this contract.

immediate_next_allowed_action.description: Next bounded action the agent may take without reading broader surfaces.

workflow_obligations.description: Repo-configured workflow obligations relevant to the startup context.

closeout_obligations.description: Closeout obligations that may apply before claiming work is complete.

memory_consult.description: Memory lookup guidance for durable repo knowledge when startup context says it is relevant.

operating_posture.description: Compact statement of the current operating mode and risk posture.

delegation_decision.description: Compact local delegation, escalation, clarification, or stay-local decision derived from local posture and task signals.

task_intent.description: Compact task-intent carry-forward guidance for subsequent implement --changed calls.

intent_acknowledgement.description: Guidance for the middle path between silent inference and clarification halt: state inferred intent, first slice, non-goals, and correction point before non-direct work.

durable_intent.description: Compact durable task, subsystem, and system intent pressure to consider before implementation.

skill_routing.description: Skill-discovery route and fallback guidance for task-specific instructions.

drill_down.description: Selector-first affordances for requesting omitted startup detail without widening the whole output.

proof.description: Proof-selection summary for the current startup or changed-path context.

items.description: One entry in the path boundaries list.

path_boundaries.description: Path-level ownership or package-boundary warnings that constrain the next action.

package.description: Fixed package value required by this contract.

version.description: Version text value used by this contract.

confidence.description: Allowed confidence value for routing or validation.
